response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, with excellent alignment to open-source, Linux, and architecture — but his German proficiency is only basic (not C1), and his resume lacks explicit evidence of team management, UML expertise, or formal project leadership at executive level, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js/Dlang), and cloud-native tools
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical leadership across multiple teams
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', falling far short of required C1
No clear evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or formal IT architecture design documentation
Resume emphasizes individual contributor roles; lacks explicit team leadership or P&L/accountability in client-facing project oversight
